instruction: Create a Lock Screen widget for iOS 26 that displays the current battery level using WidgetKit and App Intents.
Refactor an ObservableObject-based counter to use the new @Observable macro for iOS 26.
Create a visionOS immersive space that displays a 3D spinning cube using SwiftUI.
Build a macOS 26 widget that shows the current system volume using WidgetKit and App Intents.
Refactor a watchOS ObservableObject-based workout timer to use @Observable.
